nasb.text: The king’s favor is toward a servant who acts wisely, But his anger is toward him who acts shamefully.

esv.text: A servant who deals wisely has the king’s favor, but his wrath falls on one who acts shamefully.

cnv.text: 明慧的臣僕，為王喜悅； 貽羞的僕人，遭王震怒。

ccb.text: 明智的臣子蒙王喜悦， 可耻的仆人惹王发怒。

csbs.text: 明达的臣仆，得王的恩典； 带来羞耻的仆人，遭王的盛怒。
